description.zh: 平衡 / 数值工作台(规划中)· 目标:调用 balance:resim 跑 N 次重模拟,dashboard 显示胜率 + 95% 置信区间,与玩家手调数值形成闭环。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
description.en: Balance & sim workbench (planned) — will drive balance:resim for N-trial replays, dashboard win-rate + 95% CI, and loop with manual stat tweaks. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.
